description_long: This is a low-cut athletic shoe with a predominantly light pink upper and a vibrant magenta toe box, featuring a mesh and synthetic overlay construction for breathability and support. The shoe has a black padded collar and tongue for comfort, and white laces threaded through reinforced eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. The lateral side displays a large stylized Reebok vector logo in black, while the medial side is more subdued. The heel features a white midsole and a black outsole, with the 'Reebok Crossfit' branding and red triangular logo prominently displayed. The outsole appears to be made of durable rubber, designed for traction and flexibility. The overall design suggests a focus on performance, comfort, and brand visibility, suitable for urban athletic activities.
description: A light pink and magenta athletic shoe with mesh and synthetic overlays, black padded collar, and prominent Reebok branding. Designed for comfort, support, and urban athletic use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the magenta toe box, white laces, and mesh upper with a slightly raised tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the light pink mesh and synthetic overlays, white laces, and black padded collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'Reebok Crossfit' branding and red triangular logo on the heel, with a white midsole and black outsole.
description_view_3: Right side view features the large black Reebok vector logo, magenta toe, and overall streamlined silhouette.
attribute_logo: Red triangular Reebok logo on the heel and tongue, black vector logo on the right side
